interpretation: Gemma-2-2B model is gated and requires HuggingFace authentication. The SAE (GemmaScope JumpReLU) was loaded successfully, but the model could not be loaded without HF_TOKEN.
error: 401 Client Error: Access to model google/gemma-2-2b is restricted. You must have access to it and be authenticated. access it. Please set HF_TOKEN or be logged in via 'huggingface_hub.login'.
